## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling or build
- [ ] CSS API or behavior
- [ ] Refactor

## Notes

Mention any public API changes, compatibility concerns, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and easy to review.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.
- [ ] I did not commit generated `dist/` files.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, package usage, or contributor workflow changed.
